rpc.general: En roblox bootrapper skrevet fra bunden

appearance.description: Tilpas udseendet og fornemmelsen af Roblox bootstrapper.

boostrapThemeCard.title: Bootstrapper-tema
boostrapThemeCard.description: Vælg mellem standard Crush-temaet eller et brugerdefineret XML-tema.

serverNotifierCard.title: Meddelelse om serverplacering
serverNotifierCard.description: Få besked, når klienten opretter forbindelse til en server.

rpcCard.title: Discord RPC (Crush)
rpcCard.description: Udskift Roblox Rich Presence med Crush's

gameHistoryCard.title: Your game history
gameHistoryCard.description: View & play your recently played games.

gameHistory.title: Your game history
gameHistory.description: View & play your recently played games.
gameHistory.gameHistoryEmpty: Your game history is empty. Play some games to see them here! (Note that not every single server is rejoinable)

customVersion.title: Installer en brugerdefineret Roblox-version
customVersion.description: Spring opdateringstjek over, og download versionen. Standardværdien er seneste. Ugyldig version vil ikke blive downloadet og vil falde tilbage til den nyeste version.

forceReinstallCard.title: Force Reinstall Roblox
forceReinstallCard.description: Reinstall roblox everytime you launch it.

presetCard.title: Preset
presetCard.description: Use Feature Flag Preset built in in crush.

flagTable.searchNotFound: No flags found matching your search.

msaaCard.title: Anti-Aliasing Quality (MSAA)
msaaCard.description: Smooths jagged edges. Higher values look better but may reduce performance.

grassAnimationCard.title: Grass waving animation
grassAnimationCard.description: Adjusts the intensity of grass movement. (0 is no reduction, 999 or any higher number will freezes the grass, 0 & 1 slightly reduced motion and value that greater than 1 is strongly reduced motion, approaching stillness)

overwriteTextureQualityCard.title: Overwrite texture quality level
overwriteTextureQualityCard.description: Forces a custom texture quality level.

modManagement.title: Mod Management
modManagement.noModsFound: Vi fandt ingen mods her, Yuppies.

modCards.layoutNote: Mods layout inspireret af Frostraps mods manager
modCards.description: Aktivér indlæsning af mod og indstil placeringen af mod-mappen.

cursorCard.title: Markør
cursorCard.description: Skift din Roblox-markør til ældre versioner.

customFontCard.title: Tilpasset skrifttype
customFontCard.description: Skift din roblox-skrifttype til, hvad du vil.

communityMods.title: Netværksmodifikationer
communityMods.description: Udforsk modifikationer, der er oprettet af netværket.

notice.title: Ingen mod endnu
notice.description: Vi har ingen netværksmodifikationer endnu. Vær den første til at bidrage, og hjælp os med at udvide kollektionen.

languageCard.title: Sprog
languageCard.description: Vælg dit foretrukne sprog til Crush.

donateCard.title: Donér
donateCard.description: Kærlighedsforelsket? Doner til Mally for at støtte hans arbejde!
